text: Accessibility requirements: all public-facing flows must meet WCAG 2.2 AA. Mobile-first layouts are mandatory for the fintech pilot. Brand voice stays measured and evidence-backed — no hype language in product UI.

The client requested a mobile-first layout for the checkout redesign. Tablet breakpoints should preserve touch targets at 44px minimum. Reference the existing grid system documentation for spacing tokens.
Brand voice guidelines: enterprise clarity, division names over sports metaphors. Every claim in customer copy must trace to a measured result or honest empty state.
